name: local-ci-signoff
description: Reusable Codex guidance for moving ordinary CI confidence onto developer machines while preserving remote CI for publishing and release builds.

interface.longDescription: Local CI Signoff helps Codex inspect a repository's existing validation tasks, design a developer-machine CI gate, and keep remote CI focused on final publishing, protected builds, and release evidence.
defaultPrompt: Design a local CI signoff lane for this repo.
Map existing tasks into local and remote CI gates.
